channel.title: Castle-Towns on Hidden Japan Tokyo
channel.description: Recent content in Castle-Towns on Hidden Japan Tokyo

item.title: Hidden Castle Towns Near Osaka: 5 Day Trips Most Tourists Miss
item.description: Five historic castle towns within 3 hours of Osaka — including Japan's oldest surviving keep and a castle that floats above the clouds. All doable as day trips.

item.title: Hidden Castle Towns Near Tokyo: 5 Day Trips Off the Tourist Trail
item.description: Five feudal castle towns within day-trip distance of Tokyo — from Little Edo Kawagoe to the samurai streets of Aizu-Wakamatsu. No rental car needed.
